message.content:
{
  "analysis": "We have completed OCR resources: 190 1fps full-frame OCR files and 951 5fps bottom-crop OCR files. The ending OCR explicitly states the game was completed in 262 moves, so the final solution must contain exactly 262 command lines. Previous candidate extractors produced noisy/undercounted logs (e.g., segment_submits had 178 entries, combined had 226), and no validated /app/solution.txt has been written. The grounded next step prescribed by the judge is to run a move-increment anchored extractor over the 1fps OCR move-count transitions, inspect its candidate count/content, and iterate before writing any final file.",
  "plan": "Create and run `/app/work/move_increment_extractor.py`. It will parse move-count anchors from the 1fps OCR, collect prompt histories between transitions, collapse typing continuations while preserving repeats, apply OCR fixes, take the last delta commands for each move-count interval, and write `/app/work/logs/move_increment.log`. Then inspect the count and first/last entries. This is intermediate validation; no final solution.txt will be written until the count is 262 and the sequence is coherent.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/work/move_increment_extractor.py <<'PY'
import glob, os, re

fs=sorted(glob.glob('/app/work/ocr/frame_*.txt'), key=lambda p:int(os.path.basename(p).split('_')[1].split('.')[0]))

fixes={
    'gY':'y','Y':'y','G':'again','g':'again',
    'move,':'move rug','open tra':'open trap',
    'ulysse':'ulysses','ulyss':'ulysses',
    'pu,':'put','pu':'put',
    'Dopen':'open','dopen':'open',
    'elose':'close','ceage':'cage','eage':'cage','ca_':'cage','ca':'cage',
    'mirro':'mirror',
    'temp':'temple','tem':'temple','tem_':'temple',
    'rin':'ring','dro':'drop',
    'get all fr':'get all from cage','get all from _':'get all from cage','get all from ca_':'get all from cage',
    'get lamp,clove':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,sc':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,screw':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver',
    'put torch,scr':'put torch,screwdriver','put torch,screw':'put torch,screwdriver',
    'get huge, tor':'get huge,torch','get huge,torc':'get huge,torch','get nuge,torcn':'get huge,torch','get huge,tor':'get huge,torch',
    'get egg,sow':'get egg,sword,lamp','get egg, sword,1':'get egg,sword,lamp',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,go':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg, golden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,gold':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, Jade ,cup,egg,goiden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'Wind ac':'wind canary','Wind canary':'wind canary','win':'wind canary','win_':'wind canary',
    '1li':'li','1lid':'lid','Lid':'lid','lid':'lid',
    'wW':'w','e,':'e','d.':'d','ne.':'ne',
    'n.':'n',
    'case':'case',
}

def clean_prompt(s):
    s=s.strip()
    if not s.startswith('>'):
        return ''
    s=s[1:].strip().rstrip('._').strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return fixes.get(s,s)

frames=[]
for idx,p in enumerate(fs,1):
    txt=open(p,errors='ignore').read()
    m=re.search(r'Moves?:\s*(\d+)', txt)
    mv=int(m.group(1)) if m else None
    prompts=[]
    for l in txt.splitlines():
        c=clean_prompt(l)
        if c:
            prompts.append(c)
    frames.append({'idx':idx,'mv':mv,'prompts':prompts})

anchors=[(i,frames[i]['mv']) for i in range(len(frames)) if frames[i]['mv'] is not None]
print('Anchors:', anchors[:20], '...', anchors[-10:])

candidates=[]
prev_i, prev_mv = 0, 0

for end_i, end_mv in anchors:
    if end_mv <= prev_mv:
        continue
    delta = end_mv - prev_mv
    interval=[]
    for j in range(prev_i, end_i+1):
        for p in frames[j]['prompts']:
            interval.append((frames[j]['idx'], p))
    collapsed=[]
    for j,p in interval:
        if collapsed:
            last_j, last_p = collapsed[-1]
            if p.startswith(last_p) and len(p) >= len(last_p):
                collapsed[-1] = (j, p)
                continue
            if last_p.startswith(p) and len(last_p) - len(p) <= 3:
                continue
        collapsed.append((j,p))
    kept=[]
    for n,(j,p) in enumerate(collapsed):
        is_prefix=False
        for k in range(n+1, len(collapsed)):
            jj,pp = collapsed[k]
            if pp.startswith(p) and len(pp) > len(p):
                is_prefix=True
                break
        if not is_prefix:
            kept.append((j,p))
    chosen = kept[-delta:] if delta <= len(kept) else kept
    if len(chosen) < delta:
        chosen = collapsed[-delta:]
    for j,p in chosen:
        candidates.append((j,p))
    prev_i, prev_mv = end_i, end_mv

final=[]
for j,p in candidates:
    if final and final[-1][1] == p:
        continue
    final.append((j,p))

with open('/app/work/logs/move_increment.log','w') as f:
    for n,(j,p) in enumerate(final,1):
        f.write(f'{n:03d} f{j:03d} {p}\n')

print('candidate_count', len(final))
print('first20', final[:20])
print('last20', final[-20:])
PY
python3 /app/work/move_increment_extractor.py
wc -l /app/work/logs/move_increment.log
sed -n '1,120p' /app/work/logs/move_increment.log
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '121,280p' /app/work/logs/move_increment.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "tail -40 /app/work/logs/move_increment.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
